name: Confluence
description: Atlassian Confluence wiki and documentation platform. Search, create, and manage pages and spaces in Confluence Cloud.

credential_fields.name: authToken
credential_fields.label: Auth Token
credential_fields.description: Base64 encoded email:api_token (generate API token at id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens)

tools.name: search_content
tools.description: Search Confluence content using CQL (Confluence Query Language). Returns pages, blog posts, and other content matching the query. Note: This uses the v1 search endpoint as v2 does not have a search API. Examples: 'type=page AND space=DEV', 'text~"project plan"', 'label=meeting-notes'.

cql.description: Confluence Query Language (CQL) query string. Examples: 'type=page AND space=DEV', 'text~"search term"', 'label=important AND creator=currentUser()'.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 25, max 50).

tools.name: get_page
tools.description: Retrieve a specific Confluence page by its ID. Returns page title, body content, version info, and metadata. Use body-format to control content representation.

page_id.description: The unique ID of the Confluence page to retrieve.

body_format.description: The format for the page body content. 'storage' returns XHTML storage format, 'atlas_doc_format' returns Atlassian Document Format (ADF), 'view' returns rendered HTML.

tools.name: create_page
tools.description: Create a new page in a Confluence space. Provide the space ID, page title, and body content. The body can be in storage format (XHTML) or atlas_doc_format (ADF JSON).

spaceId.description: The ID of the space where the page will be created.

status.description: The status of the page. 'current' publishes immediately, 'draft' saves as draft.

title.description: The title of the new page.

parentId.description: The ID of the parent page. If omitted, the page is created at the root of the space.

body.description: The body content of the page.

value.description:
The body content. For 'storage' format, use XHTML (e.g. '

Hello

'). For 'atlas_doc_format', use ADF JSON as a string.

tools.name: update_page
tools.description: Update an existing Confluence page. You must provide the page ID, new title, body content, and a version object with the incremented version number. Fetch the page first to get the current version number.

id.description: The ID of the page to update.

title.description: The updated title of the page.

version.description: Version information. The number must be incremented from the current version.

number.description: The new version number (must be current version + 1).

message.description: Optional version comment describing the change.

tools.name: list_spaces
tools.description: List all Confluence spaces the authenticated user has access to. Returns space keys, names, types, and descriptions. Supports cursor-based pagination.

limit.description: Maximum number of spaces to return (default 25, max 250).

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response to get the next page of results.

type.description: Filter by space type. 'global' for team spaces, 'personal' for individual user spaces.

tools.name: get_space
tools.description: Retrieve details about a specific Confluence space by its ID. Returns the space key, name, type, description, and homepage information.

space_id.description: The unique ID of the Confluence space to retrieve.
